title: ServicePoint
description: A service-delivery agent / outlet (e.g. a payment agent, distribution point). Backed by the Odoo model `spp.service.point`. Returned by `getServicePoint` / `searchServicePoint`.

spp_id.description: OpenSPP public identifier for the service point, prefixed with `SVP_` (e.g. `SVP_8P4KP4RT`).

area_id.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to the `spp.area` where the service point is located.

service_type_ids.description: Many2many references to service-type tags. Returned as a list of Odoo ids.

program_ids.description: Many2many references to programs this service point delivers. (The adaptor renames Odoo's `program_id` field to `program_ids` on `searchServicePoint`.)

shop_address.description: Physical address of the agent / outlet.

is_contract_active.description: Whether the agent's contract is currently active.

is_disabled.description: Whether the service point is disabled.
